profile_backing.source: fresh RCH criterion linalg profile after Cholesky closeouts

top_rows.name: linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64
top_rows.note: Top broad-profile row, but direct GEMM remains blocked by the exact-order floating-point contract.

top_rows.name: linalg/pinv_256x128_f64
top_rows.route: top shippable non-GEMM row for an exact-order-preserving SVD/Jacobi lever

focused_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-sn7f2-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/pinv_256x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 8 --noplot

candidate.lever: cache per-column squared norms across one-sided Jacobi SVD sweeps
candidate.description: Maintained col_norm2 in one_sided_jacobi_svd_real so each p/q pair scanned W only for gamma, then recomputed the two changed column norms during the same W rotation loop.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-sn7f2-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/pinv_256x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 8 --noplot

proof_result.details: 2 one-sided Jacobi tests and 8 pinv tests passed on fmd before the after-benchmark rejected the lever.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved Jacobi p/q traversal, gamma accumulation order, W rotation order, V rotation order, singular sort, and pseudo-inverse write order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Singular-value sort remained total_cmp on the same values; no new tie-breaking surface was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate recomputed updated norms in the same row order over newly written W columns and kept gamma accumulation order unchanged; final production source was restored because speed regressed.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: pinv and one-sided Jacobi SVD consume no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public dtype, shape, or error surface changed in candidate state; final production source was restored.

alien_source.applied_slice: Tried to reuse Jacobi column norms instead of recomputing alpha and beta for every pair.

next_primitive.target: reprofile current main and attack a materially different linalg primitive
next_primitive.reason: The cached-norm invariant adds enough state traffic to regress pinv_256x128_f64; do not repeat Jacobi norm-caching without a new profile showing alpha/beta scans dominate.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2.0 score gate with same-worker RCH A/B and unchanged golden sha256
proof_obligations: floating-point operation order unchanged unless a separate behavior-contract bead admits tolerance
